title: Zombie Picnic
text: If zombies had a picnic, what would they {verb} to eat? Everybody knows zombies love to {verb} {body part}, but did you know they also enjoy {body part} and even {body part}? The best {noun} for a zombie picnic is when the moon is {adjective}. At least one zombie will bring {food} to drink, and it's not a picnic without {body part} with extra flesh on top. After eating, zombies will {verb} {adjective} games like kick the {body part} and {body part} toss. What fun!
